function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_19__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 4 invoices linked to the tax-firm client (Claudia Reiter / Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH).

Thanks,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write appears valid: attachments were all read, ordered newest-first, recipient matches canonical miles entity, and YAML subject safely quoted. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Outbound draft file was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed successfully: processed oldest inbox item, prepared reply draft with correct attachments, and removed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the inbox request.

function.message: Worked the oldest inbox message by processing the request from Miles, resolving the tax-firm client as Claudia Reiter, and creating a draft reply email with the oldest four linked Helios invoices attached. The processed inbox file was then deleted.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical metadata, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, created outbound email via sending-email workflow, enforced newest-first attachment ordering in outbox write, and deleted inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical inbox email at 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md requested oldest 4 invoices for the tax-firm client. Sender miles@novak.example matched 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Tax-firm client resolved to Claudia Reiter in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Invoice files INV-0006 through INV-0009 each explicitly list related_entity Claudia Reiter and Helios tax-firm counterparty, establishing linkage. Outbound draft was written in 60_outbox/outbox with those four attachments (newest-first order per rule), then the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
